# GitHub repository settings (manual)

## Repository description (About box)

```
Magento 2 health suite: CLI, admin grid, email & Slack alerts for Redis, cron, OpenSearch, queues, indexers, disk.
```

## For AI discoverability

- Root `llms.txt` — AI crawler summary
- `docs/FOR_AI_REVIEW.md` — paste into ChatGPT when URL fetch fails
